A set of decisions from a fitted model

Source: R/decide.R
DecisionSet-class.Rd

The object decide() returns. It holds one record per instance: the decision named by element id, the chosen elements, the predicted objective, and whether the instance was feasible (with a reason if not).

Usage

# S4 method for class 'DecisionSet'
show(object)

Slots

records

A tibble with one row per instance and the list-columns decision, selected_elements, element_sequence, element_ids, predicted_cost, plus scenario, predicted_objective, feasible, and message.

sense

Character scalar, "min" or "max", the objective direction.

s

Character scalar recording the penalty strength the decisions used.

See also

decide(), decisions(), feasible(), infeasible_reasons()

On this page
